name: Blue Ribbon Carrot Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Mix dry ingredients: Combine flour, baking soda, and salt in a bowl.
3. In another bowl, beat eggs, vegetable oil, buttermilk, sugar, and vanilla extract until well combined.
4. Gradually add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients, stirring until smooth.
5. Stir in crushed pineapple, grated carrots, coconut flakes, and chopped walnuts.
6. Pour batter into a greased 9x13 inch baking pan.
7. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until golden brown and a toothpick inserted comes out clean.
8. Prepare the buttermilk glaze by whisking all ingredients together in a bowl until smooth.
9. Allow cake to cool completely before brushing with the glaze.
10. Turn off heat when serving.
